title: Sign reportedly under controversy for about a year
text: For approximately one year prior to the article's publication, the electric sign had reportedly been under controversy within the community. The nature of the controversy itself is not described.

title: Chamber of commerce meeting and action
text: The chamber of commerce took action on the sign at a meeting reported as occurring the night before the article's publication, on or about June 28, 1927.

metadata.note: Date inferred from 'last night' language in an article dated 1927-06-29; not independently confirmed.

title: Article published
text: The Pomona Progress published the article reporting the chamber's decision on June 29, 1927, on page 5.

title: Installation expected, not confirmed
text: The article states the sign was to be erected immediately following the announcement. No source in this pack confirms that installation actually occurred, when it was completed, or in what form.
